review_title: AdminByRequest Product for PAM for Workstations or Servers
author: Shlomi F.
pros: it has all of the features required from a PAM solution. the portal is very intuitive and easy to understand and the deployment is super easy. there are no issues with the software like glitches or bugs.the agent is very small (under 2 MB) and doesn't generate performance issues on devices.you can pre-approve software, and deploy and approval mechanism. you can even revoke admin rights for Helpdesk teams but leave them an easy to use elevation method.
cons: blocking elevation of child process for pre-approved software.

review_title: Perfect way to give limited admin access to remote users
description: It has allowed me to grant users the ability to have an extra layer of security when performing admin functions on a laptop, without having them log in as local administrators.
author: James E.
pros: The ability to allow remote users with limited connectivity the ability to install/customize software without direct remote admin support.
cons: On rare occasions, it doesn't work as expected and I must uninstall it, log in as admin, install software, then reinstall AdminByRequest. VERY rare...1% of the time.

review_title: AbR honest review and feedback
description: Overall, Admin By Request is most appreciated for its user-friendly approach to privileged access management, robust security features, and cost-effective, flexible deployment that supports both IT efficiency and end-user productivity. It needs further refinement and added features.
author: Wil K.
pros: Intuitive interface and straightforward deployment. Pricing is reasonable. End users and IT teams alike appreciate the non-disruptive nature of the solution.
cons: Slow response times for privilege elevation requests or automated workflows are a frequent point of criticism due to lack of automation and off line keys do not work bricking the machine.

review_title: Great product
description: 10/10, I would recommend this to anyone that needs to provide admin rights to users when needed and whitelist apps.
author: Andrew S.
pros: Easy to use and add new apps into the dashboard. Giving users admin rights has been very easy. Apple watch and mobile app have been great.
cons: Little hard at first to setup but support was very helpful once going. After that it's very easy to use

review_title: Excellent tool for controlling admin rights
description: Overal my experience with ABR has been great and I can highly recommend it. The initial setup worked like a charm.
author: Morten L.
pros: My company has used Admin By Request for several years and it works perfectly. Using this tool we can in a simple and easy way control our users admin access to Windows devices. Another great feature is the audit log of device changes. Furthermore, we can group our users - e.g. our developers can run specific programs pre-approved. We also use ABR on our Windows servers which is great for auditing. The license price is very fair. The communication with the ABR team has been very pleasant.
cons: No real problems. The helpdesk could be a bit faster. Adding extra licenses could be easier and more smooth.

review_title: Reliable Security Made Easy
description: I have had a really great experience with Admin By Request. We use it daily on every single machine, and it just works. I’ve really appreciated the way they have designed and thought through this software—it’s clear that a lot of care has gone into making it reliable and easy to use.
author: Mads kargo N.
pros: What I have appreciated most about Admin By Request is their fast and responsive service, as well as the user-friendly product that works straight out of the box. We found it very easy to get started, and since we implemented it two years ago, we haven’t experienced any issues. It’s reassuring to know that the system just works, and that support is always quick to assist if any questions arise.
cons: The only area that could be improved is keeping the guides up to date, but that’s a minor point.... :)

review_title: Fleet control and no more end-users with admin rights!
description: ABR is very easy to deploy and manage. It gave us tight control over what our users can do on their devices. We have the ability now to approve requests for app installs remotely or to give administrator sessions if someone from the IT team is providing support on the device
author: Dane M.
pros: It gave us security control of our fleet and allows us to be sure that our images and SOE stays as it should.
cons: It is not invoked 100% of the time that we require it. There have been instances such as when a user attempts to install an app from the MacOS App Store, where it prompts for a local administrator username and password as normal rather than opening ABR

review_title: Admin By Request very solid and relay able PAM solution
description: Super good solution to control admin privileges and which Application can be installed. Even more the solution is able to black and white list Applications. There is auditing in place as well. In case you have a Support Case the vendor is really acting quick an fast and providing you a solution.
author: Bernd I.
pros: No local Admins on Windows clients and Macs is a big big improvement in the security. Removing the permanent admin rights for IT guys reduced at the same time the attack surface of our clients.
cons: Personally I have no complains, however it takes you a lot of communication in the company to convince IT administrator, that they have to request admin privileges and not getting them permanently.

review_title: It just works
author: Kane W.
pros: Really impressed with how easy the platform is to use and deploy. It’s straightforward for users to get started without needing much technical support. The customer service team has been quick to respond to any issues, and they genuinely listen to feedback to help improve the experience
cons: There is currently nothing I don't like with Admin by request, as it does what it says on the tin and just works

review_title: Stay in Control of What Gets Installed
description: After a bit of setup and some time to get to know it, it works great, and the support is fantastic whenever needed.
author: Kasper O.
pros: That I have more control over what is being installed and by whom. Provides good protection against unwanted software, as my approval as admin is required before a program is allowed to run.
cons: Some programs are difficult to pre-approve, so you get interrupted with a request for approval. Fortunately, it is easy to approve.

review_title: Sehr guter Just in Time access
description: bis hierhin sehr gut auch was die collaboration angeht. selbst kleinere Probleme egal auf welcher Seite ob Kunde oder Dienstleister werden sehr professionell und schnell angenommen.
author: Matthias F.
pros: Simpel und gut umzusetzen, vergleichsweise schneller support und kundennähe ist extrem gut. Die Response ist sehr schnell und einfach und alles ist extrem gut konfigurierbar.
cons: leider wären einige granularere Einstellungen sinnvoll die es by default nicht gibt, aber es ist stets möglich mit dem Hersteller zu sprechen und ggf. neue Features zu bekommen.

review_title: Genau das, wonach wir die letzten Jahre gesucht haben ;)
description: Seit der Implementierung des Produktes, welches sich sehr einfach gestaltete, konnten wir den Angriffsvektor der lokalen Adminrechte auf Client Betriebssystemen extrem reduzieren.
author: Daniel P.
pros: Das Produkt ist sehr flexibel einsatzbar und hilft ungemein das Problem privilegierter Accounts auf Rechnern einzuschränken.
cons: die Funktion Support Assist funktioniert manchmal nicht einwandfrei, so dass hindert vor allem dem First Level Support an ihrer Tätigkeit.
author_profession: Deputy Head of IT Enterprise Services

review_title: Easy decision for
author: David M.
pros: Quick set up, free POC to really see how the product would work in our environment. Responsive representative to handle questions. And the product worked as advertised.
cons: During POC, I could not directly interact with support. Questions needed to be directed to sales. That said, sales was responsive.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Fantastic savings of time.
author: Jeremy P.
pros: We use ABR for the use of requesting Admin use by those that need it often, but do not have permissions due to our customer security requirements. My IT team has designated and created some auto-approved tasks that streamline the process significantly for the employees. The audit log feature is amazing to ensure that what is requested is what was done by the user.
cons: It does seem that some of the default settings with in ABR override the settings that we enabled for our standard user set via Azure AD/Intune. Things like deleting an icon or changing the time on a computer were allowed by our user setup, but the ABR removes that permission upon installation.

review_title: A must for higher Education
description: We had a lot of users at the university with local admin rights. There are so many different departments that use different software and are always in need of updates. Having Admin by Request allows us to manage admin rights, and we do it all remotely using the app on phones to grant permission. We recommend Admin by Request to any organization that wants to keep their network secure by denying local admin rights.
author: Tamer E.
pros: What we like most is the flexibility. We are able to use ABR off campus through our cell phones to grant requests. Also the price point for the software is excellent and helps us make the decision to renew every year!
cons: I know this may sound crazy, but we have yet to see any cons at this point. This could change down the road, but as of now there is not any.

review_title: Simple to set-up, easy to use, great reporting
author: Mike B.
pros: Easy to set-up and configure vs other platforms for PAM. Effective in managing user's rights while also being flexible in times that it needs to be. Integrations are seamless making it VERY fast to respond to any user requests.
cons: Nothing to add here, everything has been great.

review_title: Privileged Access Management (PAM) mit Admin by Request
author: Tobias S.
pros: Die Fähigkeit, den administrativen Zugriff auf Systeme und Anwendungen zu kontrollieren und zu überwachen, trägt dazu bei, unbefugte Zugriffe und potenzielle Sicherheitsverletzungen zu reduzieren.
cons: Es gibt Situationen, in denen ein Administrator spontan auf erhöhte Berechtigungen zugreifen muss, um schnell auf eine bestimmte Aufgabe reagieren zu können. Diese sind dann leider nicht immer direkt verfügbar, da Windows hier doch noch weitere Programme startet, die dann nicht unter erhöhten Rechten gestartet wurden.

review_title: Admin By Request Review
description: Overall AdminByRequest has been an amazing product to manage both our Windows and Apple devices with one platform.
author: Nimeet S.
pros: Admin By Request is a great product. Much easier to use than other Access Management Systems and very user friendly compared to most.
cons: Customer service could be a little more responsive

review_title: First thing in 25+ years to work!
author: James C.
pros: We are able to remove local admin rights from users and easily grant permissions to run items as admin when needed. Tried for decades and this was the first thing I foudn that was easy to use, admin and deploy
cons: I literally can not think of any cons. There were growing pains with our users who were used to having admin rights locally, btu that was to be expected.

review_title: Admin by request review
author: Reid S.
pros: The portal is very easy to use. From an admin side, it is a cake walk.
cons: Not much. Keep up the great work. This is helped our company tremendously.

review_title: Aktuell unabdingbar zur macOS Verwaltung
description: Als Admin leicht zu verwalten, API gibt genug Daten, um ein anständiges Reporting zu erhalten.
author: Timo G.
pros: Nutzerfreundlich, schneller Service, macht macOS-Verwaltung wesentlich einfacher
cons: Deinstallation der Software, User können ihre macBooks öfters nicht eigenständig zurücksetzen "kein Adminuser gefunden" -> Recovery Mode -> Terminal -> benutzerunfreundlich

review_title: Exactly what we needed to whitelist applications
author: Ricardo M.
pros: - Easy to deploy and manage- Easy for users to understand when submitting privilege elevation requests- Fair price
cons: I felt it was pretty easy to understand, but I also haven't used any other products to whitelist applications

review_title: Great Software
description: Great product, easy to implement, great support
author: Martin T.
pros: The best part was how easy it was to implement and deploy.
cons: Nothing - great product that is easy to setup.

review_title: Nie wieder User mit permanten Administrativen Berechtigungen
description: Schnelle und unkomplizierte Implementierung Benutzerfreundlichkeit Zuverlässiger Support Mehr Sicherheit
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Die Lösung Admin by Request lässt sich schnell und unkompliziert in bestehende IT-Infrastrukturen integrieren und es benötigt keine weiteren lokalen Adminberechtigunen für die User. Es gibt detaillierte Audit-Logs und Berichte.
cons: Ältere Anwendungen die subprozesse starten, funktionieren nicht immer reibungslos mit Admin by Request.

review_title: AdminByRequest c'est top !
description: Quelques problèmes rencontrés avec la version 8.1.6, rapidement corrigés après la mise à jour en 8.5.
author: CECILE I.
pros: L’outil offre une grande autonomie aux utilisateurs pour élever leurs privilèges. Il permet également de disposer rapidement d’un compte break glass et de supprimer facilement les droits administrateurs locaux.
cons: Certaines actions exigent toujours la saisie des identifiants et du mot de passe de la session locale. Si la demande de session administrateur n’a pas été faite en amont, l’action échoue et doit être recommencée.
